title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PANT... Part... for fumes to reach up here, the whole castle must've gone up in flames...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means thousands of your men are trapped in the inferno below!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They're going to roast to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I left everything that's happening down there to them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got nothing to worry about, other than sending you flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All the towers are going up too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami!! You're okay!! What do we do?! The fire won't go out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't find zero, Sanji, frankly, USOPP, Robin, Brook, or jinbe!! I think they might still be trapped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Onigashima is basically a giant pyre now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nowhere to run unless we find a way to land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A flame this big would just eat me up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you're being a real pain, bepo!! yewch, it's hot!! pant... pant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this might be it... I don't think we're gonna make it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must've suffered a lot to end up like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! No! I'm not a burned up corpse, you hear?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to find a way to get everyone outside...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
